title: Asuka says no to pot
wikitext:
[]: Asuka says no to pot             Quote Post by arkiel » Tue Jan 15, 2013 1:54 pm http://kotaku.com/5976025/cosplaying-comedian-says-no-to-marijuana?tag=culture-smash

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Tue Jan 15, 2013 2:14 pm My opinion towards marijuana is one of ambivalence. Admittedly, I've tried it...and absolutely hated it. If someone wants to waste their time and money doing something like that, that's their business, I won't stop them. What I really hate is when they try to chalk it up as anything other than an addiction.

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Tue Jan 15, 2013 2:30 pm I've never done marijuana nor want to try, but I too don't really care if other people want to do it. I just avoid situations where I'd have to be around it, because I do have a bit of a drug phobia. I've only really happened across it once, and I just simply held my breath (since I do that around tobacco smokers too, makes me cough otherwise) and walked past 'em. As to Asuka being used in an anti-marijuana campaign, that's kind of amusing.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Tue Jan 15, 2013 2:56 pm I can't wait for a Mari-based parody.

[]:             Quote Post by Tankred » Tue Jan 15, 2013 3:13 pm Not shitkaku, pls no.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Jan 15, 2013 3:49 pm driftking18594 wrote: I can't wait for a Mari-based parody.

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Tue Jan 15, 2013 3:51 pm robersora wrote: Mari would say yes to drugs, wouldn't she?

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Jan 15, 2013 3:58 pm Catamari wrote: I'm convinced she's already on them.

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Tue Jan 15, 2013 9:07 pm Too bad, if there's a pilot who could benefit from the effects of pot it's Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by arkiel » Tue Jan 15, 2013 10:11 pm driftking18594 wrote: I can't wait for a Mari-based parody.

[]:             Quote Post by moonwolf2024 » Tue Jan 15, 2013 10:22 pm arkiel wrote: Mari says no to pot! AND YES TO METH! YES YES YES YES YES TO METH! METH! /Mari rips a squirrel in half

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Jan 15, 2013 10:29 pm lol, it would be so fun to watch the children on all kinds of drugs. that would have been a fun Episode to watch!

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Jan 15, 2013 11:00 pm Meh, straight-edge nonsense.

[]:             Quote Post by Practice » Tue Jan 15, 2013 11:08 pm robersora wrote: lol, it would be so fun to watch the children on all kinds of drugs. that would have been a fun Episode to watch!

[]:             Quote Post by moonwolf2024 » Tue Jan 15, 2013 11:18 pm I can see it now..All them trippin on shrooms( a hallucinogenic drug). Shinji balled up in a corner screaming OH MY GOD, OH MY GOD....Mari singing LET THE SUN SHINE....Asuka yelling at everyone the shut the fuck up....and Rei laying on the floor, arms wide, saying....I am one with the world ( I actually had this experience once....it was AWESOME)

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Wed Jan 16, 2013 4:47 am Yea, I figure Asuka is the pilot least likely to try drugs. She'd probably view them as juvenile and not worth her time. On the other hand she could have the opposite reaction.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 16, 2013 5:08 am NemZ wrote: Meh, straight-edge nonsense.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jan 16, 2013 7:30 am I wonder if they considered the possibility of a tsundere -like interpretation of that "no".

[]:             Quote Post by FriedlCore » Wed Jan 16, 2013 12:36 pm What about an anti-alcohol campaign? Something which really kills people and has a lot more potential to turn one into an addict.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Jan 16, 2013 12:50 pm FriedlCore wrote: What about an anti-alcohol campaign? Something which really kills people and has a lot more potential to turn one into an addict.
